title: The Word Was Over

mood.label: Uneasy calm 🌥️
mood.summary: The fragile US-Iran truce came apart at the Ankara summit — Trump called the ceasefire 'over,' Central Command struck 80-plus targets, Iran claimed retaliation on US bases, Brent jumped toward $78 and the Dow slid, while a NATO aid pledge and an AI-found superconductor held the day from falling further.

style.genre: industrial-tinged dark-electronic / chamber-strings noir — a bowed cello-and-viola string ensemble tracing a circling A phrygian topline over a driving, dub-spaced LinnDrum pulse with deep tape-echo, sampled pizzicato strings pricking the offbeats, a clean tremolo electric-guitar answering low in the gaps, a plucked upright bass walking under a deep sine sub, and a bowed-string drone holding the dread; phrygian's flat second (Bb over A) leaning the whole thing toward a truce that broke without letting it collapse — oil climbing, sirens back on, and two quiet wins refusing to be drowned out

sampleSources: Strudel default library (VCSL strings, LinnDrum, sampled piano)
pattern:
stack(
  s("bd ~ ~ sd ~ ~ bd ~, ~ ~ hh ~ ~ hh ~ hh, ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ rim ~").bank("AkaiLinn").gain(0.66).room(0.18).delay(0.22).delaytime(0.1875).lpf(sine.range(1200,4200).slow(16)),
  note("<[a2,c3,e3] [bf2,d3,f3] [a2,c3,e3] [g2,bf2,d3]>").s("strings").attack(0.5).release(2.4).sustain(0.7).lpf(sine.range(600,1700).slow(24)).gain(0.28).room(0.5).rsize(4),
  note("a4 ~ bf4 c5 ~ a4 g4 ~ f4 ~ e4 ~ a4 ~ ~ ~").s("strings").gain(0.3).lpf(2600).room(0.36).delay(0.3).delaytime(0.25).jux(rev),
  note("[a4 c5] ~ e5 ~ [bf4 d5] ~ a4 ~").s("pizzicato").gain(0.24).pan(0.66).room(0.28).hpf(400),
  note("e5 ~ ~ f5 ~ ~ d5 ~").s("gm_electric_guitar_clean").gain(0.17).lpf(2200).room(0.4).delay(0.34).delaytime(0.375).pan(0.34).slow(2),
  note("a1 a1 g1 f1 a1 ~ e1 f1").s("sawtooth").lpf(560).gain(0.4).attack(0.02).release(0.3),
  note("a1").s("sine").gain(0.32).slow(2),
  note("<a2 a2 f2 e2>").s("sawtooth").attack(1.6).release(3).sustain(0.8).lpf(420).gain(0.14).room(0.6)
)

lines: He stood in Ankara and called the quiet done,
said the paper was a waste, said the waiting was a con.
Eighty targets in the dark, and a flat-second dread,
sirens over Bahrain for the truce we thought we had.
The word was over — and the Strait went tight,
oil climbing five percent up into the night.
Hold the low string down, let the pizzicato ring,
forty on the dial, not a fall, just a leaning.
Seventy billion pledged where the Kyiv smoke still hung,
two new superconductors from a model's patient tongue.
A sixth clean sheet in Madrid, a mourning in Caracas —
the ledger keeps two columns and it won't let either pass us.
The word was over — and the Strait went tight,
oil climbing five percent up into the night.
Hold the low string down, let the pizzicato ring,
forty on the dial, not a fall, just a leaning.
